tracking.

aioredis — improving throughput by ~50% and r

playback and detailed learner
tracking.
·  Migrated Jeeves from synchronous to asynchronous architecture using aiohttp, aioboto3, and
aioredis — improving throughput by ~50% and reducing I/O wait by 60%.

service communication via gRPC.
·  Integrated Novu for event-driven system notifications with customizable templates and seamless UI

· Integrated Chatwoot as a live agent support system to enhance real-time client communication.

designed APIs and schemas with insights visualized in Apache Superset.

PIs and schemas with insights visualized in Apache Superset.
